info.title: Incomex OPS Proxy — Multi-Collection API
info.description: CRUD API for AI agents (GPT, Claude) to manage 25 collections via the Directus-backed OPS proxy. Covers tasks, comments, AI tasks, posts, pages, help articles, navigation, contacts, organizations, feedbacks, content requests, categories, AI discussions, knowledge documents, and agent views. Rate-limited, API-key authenticated.

tab_scope.description: Which tab this comment belongs to

DirectusItem.description: Generic Directus collection item with dynamic fields

limit.name: limit
limit.description: Maximum number of items to return

sort.name: sort
sort.description: Sort field (prefix with - for descending, e.g. -date_created)

fields.name: fields
fields.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return

get.description: Retrieve a list of tasks. Supports Directus query parameters for filtering, sorting, and pagination.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return
